Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The GetCroppedImageDimensions method returns the resulting image size if the specified offset and maximum region size are applied to the actual image data in the output buffer. This can be used to appropriately size a buffer to pass into the ReadBufferData method.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: V2UInt32 GetCroppedImageDimensions(const V2UInt32& imageOffsetInPixels, const V2UInt32& imageRegionInPixels) const;

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The top-left pixel offset of the requested crop region.
The pixel dimensions of the requested crop region. A zero value requests the remaining captured image from the offset.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: The dimensions of the requested cropped region, in pixels, after clamping to the captured image.
